steps.title: Use the triangle angle sum
steps.content:
The three angle measures in a triangle add to $180^\circ$:
$$38+90+\frac{k}{2}=180$$

steps.title: Solve for the variable
steps.content:
Combine the known angles and isolate $k$:
$$128+\frac{k}{2}=180$$
$$\frac{k}{2}=52$$
$$k=104$$
The answer is C.
